regions.text: Coal and oil are sun’s energy stored by plants millions of years ago. Coal comes from dead plants under pressure in the earth.
We are using coal and oil very quickly. Soon we may use up all that is easy to get.
Men have been taking oil since 1860. Without oil there would be no cars or airplanes. car: automobile.
It is strange to think that planes depend on what plants were doing millions of years ago.
